subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 10 (Tablet to the tenth Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who ordaineth the measure of all things by His command "Be, and it is!" He it is Who knoweth that which is in the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله البهی المتباهی. سبحان الذی یقدر مقادیر کل شیء بأمره کن فیکون هو الذی یعلم ما فی السموات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
